info.name: DEMIF - Lesson APIs
info.description:
Bộ Postman collection test tất cả Lesson APIs trong Demif-BE.

## Hướng dẫn:
1. **Import** file này vào Postman
2. Chạy **0. Setup → Login (Admin)** trước để lấy token
3. Token tự động lưu vào biến `{{admin_token}}`
4. Test tuần tự theo số thứ tự: 1 → 2 → 3 → ...

## Variables:
- `base_url`: http://localhost:5077
- `admin_token`: JWT token admin
- `user_token`: JWT token user
- `lesson_id`: ID lesson vừa tạo (auto-set)

body.raw:
{
  "title": "Daily Conversation: At the Coffee Shop",
  "description": "Practice everyday English used when ordering at a coffee shop. Learn common phrases and vocabulary.",
  "lessonType": 0,
  "level": 0,
  "category": "daily",
  "audioUrl": "https://storage.demif.com/lessons/coffee-shop.mp3",
  "durationSeconds": 35,
  "fullTranscript": "Good morning. Can I have a large coffee please? Sure, would you like cream and sugar? Yes, just a little sugar. That will be three dollars and fifty cents. Here you go. Thank you, have a nice day!",
  "isPremiumOnly": false,
  "displayOrder": 1,
  "tags": "[\"daily\", \"conversation\", \"beginner\"]",
  "status": "published"
}

exec: console.log('✅ Premium Lesson ID saved: ' + json.id);

body.raw:
{
  "title": "TED Talk: The Power of Vulnerability",
  "description": "Challenge yourself with an advanced dictation exercise from a famous TED Talk.",
  "lessonType": 0,
  "level": 2,
  "category": "academic",
  "audioUrl": "https://storage.demif.com/lessons/ted-vulnerability.mp3",
  "durationSeconds": 75,
  "fullTranscript": "So I will start with this. A couple of years ago, an event planner called me because I was going to do a speaking event. And she called and said, I am really struggling with how to write about you on the little flyer. And I thought, well what is the struggle? She said, I saw you speak and I am going to call you a researcher. But I am afraid that if I call you a researcher, no one will come because they will think you are boring and irrelevant.",
  "isPremiumOnly": true,
  "displayOrder": 2,
  "tags": "[\"academic\", \"ted-talk\", \"advanced\", \"premium\"]",
  "status": "published"
}

{
  "title": "Lesson with Custom VTT Transcript",
  "description": "Admin cung cấp TimedTranscript custom từ VTT file.",
  "lessonType": 0,
  "level": 1,
  "category": "custom",
  "audioUrl": "https://storage.demif.com/lessons/custom.mp3",
  "durationSeconds": 20,
  "fullTranscript": "Welcome to our class. Today we will learn about programming.",
  "timedTranscript": "[{\"startTime\":0.0,\"endTime\":3.5,\"text\":\"Welcome to our class.\"},{\"startTime\":3.5,\"endTime\":8.0,\"text\":\"Today we will learn about programming.\"}]",
  "isPremiumOnly": false,
  "displayOrder": 3,
  "status": "published"
}
